# Santander

> Geotechnical engineering company in Chile, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Amplificacion Sismica](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/amplificacion-sismica/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/calicatas-exploratorias/)
- [Cbr Vial](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/cbr-vial/)
- [Cimentaciones](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/cimentaciones/)
- [Clasificacion Suelos](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/clasificacion-suelos/)
- [Columnas Grava](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/columnas-grava/)
- [Compactacion Dinamica](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/compactacion-dinamica/)
- [Compresion Simple](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/compresion-simple/)
- [Deep Soil Mixing](https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/deep-soil-mixing/)

- Website: https://santander.geotecnia1.biz/

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in Chile.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
